title: Crown of Glory

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In Your strength, O Lord, I stand
Victory flows from Your mighty hand
Every prayer You've heard me pray
Your blessings crown me day by day

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You place a crown of purest gold
Your love and grace, more wealth than I can hold
Forever blessed, forever more
Your presence is what I live for

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Through the fire, through the flame
Your faithful love remains the same
My enemies may rise and fall
But Your glory towers over all

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Your light shines bright
Your power burns like flame
All creation trembles
At the mention of Your name

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Generations yet to come
Will hear the victories You have won
Your mercy reaches to the sky
Your justice makes the darkness fly

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You place a crown of purest gold
Your love and grace, more wealth than I can hold
Forever blessed, forever more
Your presence is what I live for

sections.label: Outro
lines: We lift our voices high to praise
Your majesty through endless days

epigraph: thou settest a crown of pure gold on his head
